Headline: #172 U. of Chicago/Kenwood Temporary Reroute near 53rd/ Woodlawn
ShortDescription: #172 U. of Chicago/Kenwood buses temporarily rerouted due to street blockage near 53rd/ Woodlawn.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#172 U. of Chicago/Kenwood buses temporarily rerouted due to street blockage near 53rd/ Woodlawn.

Northbound buses will operate via 53rd, Cornell and Hyde Park over the normal route.

Southbound buses will operate via Hyde Park, Lake Park, 53rd and Ellis over the normal route.

Allow extra travel time.
